videos.title: GFNY Miami. 2024 Official video! Thanks everyone, see you next year!
GFNY NYC 2023. Race video.
videos.transcript:
welcome to the 2023 edition of the gfny
world championship in New York City
the gfny world championship is truly an
International race with thousands of
riders coming from all over the planet
with new cash prizes for intermediate
Sprints and an updated course
[Music]
[Applause]
it's also the finale of the gfny global
Endurance Sports series which Now
features an incredible 40 races
worldwide this year the race was faster
and more competitive than ever Pro and
amateur cyclists left off the starting
line on the spectacular George
Washington Bridge and zipped through
Fort Lee and into Palisades Interstate
Park the Sparks flew again on the
climate Alpine as Italian matiagafuri
last year's second place finisher
casually tested his legs he jumped to
the front of the race taking the Sprint
cream at the top but once there gaffordi
sat up there was plenty of Road left and
he was happy to let his SWAT club
teammates do some of the hard work
controlling the race the first serious
attack came with 100K still to go
Colombian Jaime Vergara was quickly
joined by Miguel Arroyo from Mexico but
SWAT club wasn't going to let them get
too far a pack of nearly 30 riders with
all the race favorites was close behind
got four divided time while teammates
like David minote and Francesco Zant
Tedeschi helped keep the Gap to the
leaders to less than a minute
and then it was him alone against the
Peloton American time trial champ Ben
Wolf launched the charge that finally
kicked the footy into action seeing an
opportunity South African Alexander
wurzdale briefly jumped onto furry's
wheel and then hung on for dear life but
by the summit of cheese coat all the
challengers had faded from memory it was
now Jessica furry on a long solo drive
to the finish the disorganized Chase
group somewhere down the road
dusted the field in a time of 327-32
nearly seven minutes faster than the
second and third place finishers
in the women's race it was a similarly
dominant performance Italian Kiara dhoni
also from SWAT club LED from start to
finish obviously SWAT club came to win
but coming in second and third was still
a cause for celebration for the Italians
Annalisa Prato and last year's champ
Samantha Arnaldo they finished the way
they started together with big smiles on
their faces at the Finish Riders
collected their medals before reuniting
with friends and family at the gfny
Finnish Village in Fort Lee
gfny is always an amazing event music
food drinks and of course prizes the
overall men's and women's Champions were
awarded a spectacular all-expense paid
trip to the next gfny NYC World
Championships the first six finishers
will also race the new UCI Pro Race
Grand Premio gfny next year as part of
team gfmy
the next day some of the top Riders
gathered on one of the towers of the
George Washington Bridge for a very
special gfny honor a view Fit For A
Champion for the gfny world championship
thanks again for watching and don't wait
sign up today for a gfny race India Pro
for a day
foreign
